$comment: Downstream consumers of Cortexel. A consumer listed here is NOT thereby certified. 'state' is the only claim.

consumers.notes: Engram frontend/package.json, its lockfile, and its release receipt currently agree on git dependency revision 757b94c and consume the packaged legacy core/react surfaces. This is observed pin metadata only: no integration run against the current dirty Cortexel development contract has been executed, so no compatibility claim is made.
No Cortexel NCP adapter exists. A future observation adapter is planned only against an immutable released NCP identity; moving NCP HEAD is not implementation or certification evidence.
